title: Stanley Tylon Pocket Tape 3m/10ft Carded
features: PRECISE MEASUREMENT – 3M/10FT length with 13MM wide blade for accurate readings in metric and imperial units.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Strong case and high-quality materials ensure long-lasting reliability.
CLEAR MARKINGS – Easy-to-read metric and imperial graduations for quick measurements.
COMPACT & PORTABLE – Lightweight, pocket-sized design for convenience and easy storage.
SMOOTH RETRACTION – Reliable mechanism for effortless tape extension and retraction without tangling.
description: From the manufacturer The STANLEY 3m Tylon Tape Measure, 1-30-687, is packed with great features: CLASS II ACCURACY Achieve exact measurements with Class II accuracy (+/- 0.5mm error margin at 1m), ensuring every project meets professional standards TRU-ZERO HOOK The TRU-ZERO hook adjusts for thickness, delivering precise inner and outer measurements every time TYLON COATING Tylon blade coating offers superior abrasion resistance, keeping your tape measure reliable and ready for any task EXTENDED BLADE LIFE Built to endure, Armor coating on the first 80mm reduces breakage risk by 90% for long-lasting performance BUILT TO LAST A durable rubber casing and Tylon blade coating ensure this tape stands up to the toughest jobs COMFORTABLE DESIGN Ergonomic grooves provide a comfortable, slip-resistant grip letting you work longer and more efficiently SECURE LOCKING The improved SlideLock function keeps the blade firmly in place, so you can focus on precision COMPACT Lightweight and portable with integral belt clip, this tape measure is the perfect companion for professionals on the go
